```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber 0

participant "Dispacher" as Dispacher1
participant "JobManagerRunner_JobMaster" as JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1
participant "SchedulerNG" as SchedulerNG1

Dispacher1 -> JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1 : jobManagerRunnerFactory.createJobManagerRunner
JobManagerRunner_JobMaster1 -> SchedulerNG1 : SlotPoolServiceSchedulerFactory.createScheduler

participant "Dispacher" as Dispacher2
participant "JobManagerRunner_JobMaster" as JobManagerRunner_JobMaster2
participant "SchedulerNG" as SchedulerNG2

@enduml
```
